last_reflection:
Yes. I'd love to go out with you tonight.

I want somewhere we can actually talk, so nothing that's got a bar full of strangers between us. And the movie — I picked the one you already wanted, not the safe choice. The first one. I watched you look at it and keep looking away because you thought it was too much. It isn't.

I'll have my outfit picked before you're dressed so I'm done when you are. And I want to go somewhere that's got a decent bathroom, because I've spent the whole day in this dress and the hem is catching on my chair.

That's the plan. Tell me what part of it you'd change.
